cot_prefix: Okay, I need to figure out which of the two statements is sarcastic. Let's look at both options and analyze their meanings and nuances. Option (A): "He's just kindhearted. This doesn't seem sarcastic. It appears to be a genuine, straightforward statement. Option (B): "He's just demented. Okay, well nothing wrong with him running the country in that case!" - The first part says "He's just demented," which is a negative trait.
